sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n97288" key="strouqwto/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στρουθ-ωτός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n97288.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">painted</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">embroidered with birds</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0524.tlg001:100" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sophr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">100</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
